en: Dead and injured after landslide in western China. At least eight people have been killed in a landslide in China. More than ten houses were buried and dozens of people are still missing. The accident occurred east of the megacity of Chongqing.
la: Mortuus et vulneratus post ruinam in Sinis occidentalibus. Saltem octo homines in lapsu Sinarum interfecti sunt. Plus quam decem domus sepultae sunt et adhuc justo hominum desunt. Accidit casus orientalem megacity Chongqing.

en: After heavy rain: Four people died in a landslide in Vietnam. Rescue workers are searching for missing people in northwest Vietnam after heavy rain and a landslide. At least four people have died.
la: Post pluviam gravem: Quattuor homines mortui sunt in LAPPA in Vietnam. Eripe opifices quaerunt absentis homines in Vietnam chorum post pluvias graves et LAPSUS. Saltem quattuor homines mortui sunt.
